name: engine-priority
description: Defines the permanent execution order for extraction engines. Engine priority is FIXED and cannot be reordered. Firecrawl must NEVER become primary.
criticalConstraint: Firecrawl must NEVER become primary. Engine priority is FIXED and cannot be reordered.

engines.name: chrome-devtools-mcp
engines.purpose: Browser automation via MCP protocol — full DOM access, JavaScript execution, network interception, screenshots

engines.name: jcodesmore-browser
engines.purpose: Browser-like headers fetch with lazy-load triggering — HTTP client with header simulation and content expansion

engines.name: firecrawl
engines.purpose: Firecrawl API or fallback parser — managed web scraping service with fallback to local parsing
